displayTitle: The Empire Strikes Back: The Special Edition
synopsis: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back: The 40th Anniversary Special Edition, alternatively styled as the Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back 40th Anniversary Special, is a standalone Star Wars Insider commemorative issue published by Titan Comics. As the title implies, it covers various elements of the film Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back as part of its 40th anniversary, including interviews, features, as well as previously unseen images relating to the film. It was originally intended to be published on April 28, 2020, but after being repeatedly delayed, it was published on June 1, 2
title: The Empire Strikes Back: The Special Edition
